rows.description: 1825 Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Title at top of page; very clear, centered heading '1825' above 'Soluta Varia.'

rows.description: Vincent's Deficiency of Salary to Novr. 2 1824
rows.notes: Clear alignment with pounds/shillings/pence columns. Pence '3' legible; values within valid ranges.

rows.description: For the purchase of a Tenement at Waldron
rows.notes: Large round '200' in pounds column clearly aligned; shillings and pence zero.

rows.description: To Mr Dalby for prize liquidation Fund
rows.notes: Pounds '200' clearly aligned. Description wording uncertain ('prize' vs 'prise' or 'price') but amount clear.

rows.description: Power of Attorney for transfer of Jesus Fund
rows.notes: Small amount (1 4 2) clearly aligned in columns; inscription 'Power of Attorney...' legible though faint in places.

rows.description: To Mr Davenport on Acct. of the Vicarage Estate at Kidlington - see Coll. Register p.347
rows.notes: Pounds '200' clear in pounds column. Some small marginal scribbles near this line but amount columns align consistently.

rows.description: To Mr Heyes. Improved Stip. for Weston. Adm. 1824
rows.notes: Amount '26 5 0' is clear and well aligned. Description legible.
Year marker '1825.' in the left margin introducing following entries; clearly written.

rows.description: Jan. 31 Subscription to St. Clement's Church
rows.notes: Amount '50 0 0' clear in pounds column. Subscription description is legible.

rows.description: Feb. 15 Pd for a cottage grate in the Porter's lodge 13s 6d and a fixed bedstead in Do 2s 2d
rows.notes: Combined amount shown as '2 15 6' in the columns. Description contains two sub-items (13s6d and 2s2d) which sum to 2l15s6d; handwriting of amounts is clear.

rows.description: March 6 To J. Maffey for four Months service at the Porters lodge
rows.notes: Amount '15 0 0' aligns clearly; name and purpose legible.

rows.description: March 16 To Mr Patience for surveying the work in the Common Room Servants Hall
rows.notes: Amount '7 14 6' is readable though the handwriting of the description is slightly cramped; column alignment is clear.

rows.description: March 25 To Mr Heyes. Improved Stip. to LDay 1825
rows.notes: Repeat payment to Mr Heyes '26 5 0' clearly written and aligned.

rows.description: April 19 To labourers for turning the gravel in the Quad.
rows.notes: Amount '2 10 0' clear. Description legible.

rows.description: April 20 Domus Wine Bottles. Alm. H. Day 1825
rows.notes: Amount '4 6 0' clear. The description is partly abbreviated ('Domus' and 'Alm. H. Day') — transcription of abbreviations uncertain but does not affect amounts.

rows.description: May 23 To Mr Dalby, p[?] Int. to the library A.D. 1825
rows.notes: Amount '21 12 0' clear in columns. The phrase after Dalby is slightly ambiguous in the manuscript (interpreted as 'p[er] Int. to the library'), so description is uncertain.

rows.description: June 11 Mr Davis's Bill for Surveys at Little Ten(?)
rows.notes: Amount '13 12 0' is clear. Place name after 'Little' is faint/abbreviated and uncertain ('Ten' or similar), so description flagged as uncertain.

rows.description: June 17 Mr Dixon's Do for Surveys at various places
rows.notes: Large amount '80 19 0' clearly aligned. 'Do' indicates 'ditto' (same type of charge) and is readable.

rows.description: June 17 Mr Bidles(?) Do for Do at do
rows.notes: Amount '45 7 0' clear. The surname appears to be 'Biddle' or 'Bidles' — handwriting unclear for the name, so lower confidence on description but amount certain.

rows.description: June 25 Merton Land Tax, one year to Michl. 1824
rows.notes: Amount '34 19 4' clearly placed in columns; pence '4' legible though small. Description readable.

rows.description: To Mr Clowes one yrs Int. on his Deposit to Do
rows.notes: Amount '6 0 0' clear. 'Do' refers to preceding item; handwriting crisp for amounts.

rows.description: June 30 To Groves for Venison
rows.notes: Amount '6 12 0' clear and centered in amount columns. Name 'Groves' readable.

rows.description: July 1 A Bill for Horse hire in Colleg. business
rows.notes: Small amount '1 3 0' clear. Description abbreviated but understandable.

rows.description: Subscription to the Lunatic Asylum
rows.notes: Amount '50 0 0' clear; description legible and unambiguous.

rows.description: To Mr Davenport on Acct. of Kidlington Vicarage Estate
rows.notes: Amount '100 0 0' clearly in pounds column. Description repeats Davenport and Kidlington estate; slight uncertainty about exact phrasing but amount is clear.

rows.description: July 27 To Mr Heyes. Impr. Stip. to Mich. 1825
rows.notes: Amount '26 5 0' clear. Matches earlier Heyes payments; handwriting crisp.

rows.description: Oct. 12 To Messrs Williams & Dalby on acct of Baverstock
rows.notes: Amount '13 7 0' clear; names and place 'Baverstock' legible though slightly abbreviated.

rows.description: To the Rector for 5 yrs Annuity of Gosford Tythes advanced by him in the Dividends. Unrecoverable
rows.notes: Shillings read as '14' in the middle column; there is some ink clustering near the pounds column and a small leading digit that could be a marginal mark. Interpreted as 0 pounds 14s 0d; description is long but legible. Lower confidence due to small, faint marks near pounds column.

rows.description: Total (page sum)
rows.notes: Final total at lower-right reads '1202 10 9' clearly. Columns and digits are well aligned; slight smudge on final digit but value is evident.
